arts.ttl: Roma Midfielder Details Switch, Could Transfer Again
arts.sum: Enzo Le Fée has had a tough time adjusting to Serie A, also because of a knee injury, and could head back to Ligue 1 on loan, which would allow Roma to protect their €23M investment. He wouldn’t necessarily be replaced. The post Roma Midfielder Details Switch, Could Transfer Again appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
